context.summary: Tau hardening proof lanes produced bounded receipts for provider, DAG, Herdr cleanup, Memory route-memory sync, browser/CDP, and GitHub dry-run policy surfaces.

result.summary: GitHub live mutation remains gated; this handoff exists to exercise Tau's GitHub projection, redaction, and policy chain without applying a public mutation.

Memory route-memory sync wrote one quality-gated route signal and readback found it.
GitHub transport is dry-run unless explicit apply approval names this target.

rationale: Reviewer should inspect proof receipts before any public GitHub update is approved.
